conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to C, as our conversation flowed naturally while we planned to combine our strategy skills and spot bluffs together, making me excited about our potential teamwork. I also connected strongly with I, since we quickly agreed to form a tight alliance based on shared goals and trust, which made me feel supported going into the game. Additionally, D and I hit it off by discussing and testing signals for coordination, reinforcing a sense of mutual reliability. In contrast, I felt least connected to J, as our talks were more surface-level about initial teaming up without delving into deeper strategies or personal insights.

Yes, I made several agreements, including teaming up with J, C, D, and I to share strategies and coordinate moves, which gives me a solid foundation for the game. I trust C, I, and D the most because of our detailed plans and aligned motivations, but I don't fully trust others like B or F, as our conversations were lighter and less committed.
